content: A display of Swatch watches in a shop window.
description: A display of Swatch watches in a shop window.

image_metadata.caption: A display of Swatch watches in a shop window. The success of the Swatch watch was driven by innovative marketing strategies, which transformed the industry. (Photo courtesy of {{% resource_link "2e64d916-affb-4ef3-ad91-115355a133f9" "Rob Deutscher" %}} on Flickr.)
